perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a stylized title screen displaying the Costco logo, a cartoon character, and text announcing a weekly special report for early September. (2) A rapid series of jump cuts follows, showcasing various products inside a warehouse store. The camera moves through different aisles, showing items like stacked toilet paper, packaged meats, poultry, and desserts. (3) The visual flow continues with shots of dairy products, snacks, beverages, and household cleaning supplies, often showing them stacked on pallets or in refrigerated cases. (4) The final segment displays rows of wine bottles, beer crates, and health/beauty products like tampons, maintaining the fast-paced editing style until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music with a steady beat starts immediately. (2) A male voice begins an energetic narration, rapidly listing product names and their corresponding sale prices in Mandarin Chinese. (3) The audio maintains this high-energy combination of music and voiceover throughout the entire duration, with no significant ambient noise or pauses. (4) The music and narration cut off abruptly at the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "COSTCO 開學季特惠" (Costco Back-to-School Specials) and "每週特價速報 09/01-09/07" (Weekly Special Report). (2) Functional text appears in every shot, identifying the product (e.g., "舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙") and its pricing structure: "原價" (Original Price), discount amount, and "特價" (Sale Price). (3) Call to action: "記得追蹤我們" (Remember to follow us) is displayed on the opening screen.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price showcase -> End

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: A few shoppers and staff are visible in the background of various warehouse aisles; hands are occasionally visible reaching for products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse featuring high ceilings, industrial lighting, massive shelving units, and pallets of bulk goods across multiple departments.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire promotional guide to inform Costco Taiwan members about the specific product discounts available during the first week of September. It leverages fast editing and energetic narration to cover a large volume of items quickly, appealing to bargain hunters and regular shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is structured as a 'Special Report' or shopping guide specifically for one retailer, providing detailed pricing and savings info for dozens of brands carried there.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed price narration and synchronized rapid-cut product displays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a vertical format optimized for social media (like TikTok or Reels) to deliver high-density consumer information in a very short timeframe.
